description_long: This object consists of three personal care products from the Aveeno brand, including a tube, a pump bottle, and a rectangular box. The tube is white with a green cap and green accent band, featuring printed text and a logo. The pump bottle is oval-shaped with a white body, green pump, and green base, also displaying printed branding and product information. The rectangular box is white with green accents and contains similar branding and text as the other items. All three items have a clean, minimalist design with clear labeling and subtle color contrasts. The materials appear to be primarily plastic for the tube and bottle, and cardboard for the box. These items are typically found in urban environments such as bathrooms, public restrooms, or personal care stations.
description: A set of three Aveeno personal care products: a white tube with green cap, a white pump bottle with green accents, and a white rectangular box, all featuring minimalist branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tube, pump bottle, and box with clear Aveeno branding and product labels.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the narrow profile of the pump bottle, with the pump mechanism visible at the top.
description_view_2: Reverse front view with the box, pump bottle, and tube, showing the back or alternate sides of the packaging.
description_view_3: Side view of the tube and pump bottle, highlighting the curvature and cap details.
